changeSet.author: dts
changeSet.sql: UPDATE analytics_database SET database_role = CASE WHEN lower(coalesce(name, '')) IN ('园林业务库', 'copilot业务库') AND lower(coalesce(engine, '')) IN ('postgres', 'postgresql') THEN 'SYSTEM_RUNTIME' ELSE 'BUSINESS_PRIMARY' END WHERE database_role IS NULL OR trim(database_role) = '';

changeSet.author: dts

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM analytics_report_template WHERE (spec_json::jsonb -> 'queryContract' ->> 'sourceType') = 'AUTHORITY_SQL' AND ( (spec_json::jsonb -> 'queryContract' ->> 'databaseName') IS NOT NULL OR (spec_json::jsonb -> 'queryContract' ->> 'databaseRole') IS NULL ) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.sql: UPDATE analytics_report_template SET spec_json = jsonb_set( (spec_json::jsonb #- '{queryContract,databaseName}'), '{queryContract,databaseRole}', to_jsonb('BUSINESS_PRIMARY'::text), true )::text WHERE (spec_json::jsonb -> 'queryContract' ->> 'sourceType') = 'AUTHORITY_SQL';
